How to Use This United Kingdom Temporary Phone Number

This free temporary United Kingdom phone number (+447455937846) lets you receive SMS messages online without revealing your real phone number. It's commonly used for one-time SMS verifications on social media, delivery apps, classified sites, and more.

Step-by-Step Guide

  • Copy the number - Click the copy button next to +447455937846 above.
  • Paste it - Enter the number on the website or app that requires SMS verification.
  • Receive your code - The verification SMS appears in the message list above within ~30 seconds.
  • Complete verification - Enter the received OTP code to verify your account.

Why Use a Temporary Phone Number?

Temporary phone numbers protect your real number from spam, robocalls, and data breaches. They're ideal for one-time sign-ups, testing applications, or verifying accounts on platforms you don't fully trust. Temp Number provides free virtual numbers from United Kingdom and dozens of other countries with instant SMS delivery.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this United Kingdom temporary number really free? ▾
Yes, completely free. You can receive unlimited SMS messages without registration for most countries. Some regions require a free account for regulatory compliance.
How long does this number stay active? ▾
Numbers stay active as long as they continue receiving messages. Inactive numbers may be recycled, but we constantly add new ones. If this number becomes unavailable, try an alternative from the sidebar.
Can other people see my messages? ▾
Yes. This is a shared public number - all messages are visible to everyone. Never use it for personal accounts, banking, or any service containing sensitive information.
Why didn't I receive my verification code? ▾
Some services block disposable numbers. If your code doesn't arrive within 2 minutes, try a different number from our list or use the "Try Another Number" button above. Messages typically arrive within 30 seconds.

About Temp Number

Temp Number is a website that offers disposable phone numbers for safeguarding your privacy while communicating online. These temporary phone numbers can be used to receive SMS messages, without revealing your personal phone number to the other party.
